headline: A Look At Honeywell International (HON) Valuation As Analyst Targets Diverge From DCF Estimates
summary: Honeywell International (HON) has been drawing attention after recent share moves, with the stock showing mixed short term performance but stronger gains over the past 3 months and year. This has prompted fresh interest in its industrial portfolio. See our latest analysis for Honeywell International. At a share price of US$235.04, Honeywell’s recent 7 day share price return of 2.44% and 90 day share price return of 13.34% sit alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 28.34%, which points...
